title: triticum vulgare var. erinaceum
intro: Triticum vulgare var. erinaceum, also known as spelt, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of spelt include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and lower cholesterol levels. Spelt can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tea, or extracts, and it is also used as an ingredient in baked goods and other food products.
